entry.title: New: Bill 57 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE TO AMEND CHAPTER 3.34, MAUI COUNTY CODE, TO ESTABLISH A VOLUNTARY DEED RESTRICTION PROGRAM" The purpose of this bill is to enable open-market homes to be converted to deed-restricted properties, preserving the properties for local residents and the workforce while addressing the growing housing challenges in Maui County.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
